title: Nintendo Rejects Request to Share Tariff Refunds With Consumers
summary: Nintendo’s 27-page court filing argues that the consumers behind the class-action lawsuit were well aware that tariffs were behind last year's price increases . “Instead, Plaintiffs ask this Court to invent a legal duty out of whole cloth to retroactively re-price completed…
